case_title: NATIONWIDE INSURANCE COMPANY SUBROGEE vs. QUTTEINEH, MOHAMMAD B. et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONWIDE INSURANCE COMPANY SUBROGEE OF PEARL O. LIM AS TO DEFENDANT QUTTEINEH, MOHAMMAD B. DOES 1 THROUGH 50 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-17-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-14-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-25-1997

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-17-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAR-17-1997, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC FOR PLTF'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. HEARING SET FOR APR-16-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-16-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE BASED ON PLTF'S FAILURE TO APPEAR TODAY, FAILURE TO FILE POS AND STATUS CONFERENCE. PLTF TO SHOW CAUSE WHY ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED BASED ON FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. $50.00 SANCTION IS IMPOSED AGAINST PLTF PAYABLE BY 5-16-97. HEARING SET FOR MAY-21-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT QUTTEINEH, MOHAMMAD B. DOES 1 THROUGH 50 INCLUSIVE
OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-21-1997, OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL OF COMPLAINT FILED 5-19-97.
